corpus.title: Mambo Official-Source Knowledge Corpus
corpus.description: Citizen-facing retrieval corpus of official Zimbabwean government documents (ministries, statutory bodies, and trusted public legal sources) used to ground cited answers.
corpus.source: Ministry/agency websites in registry/ministries.json (allow-listed official hosts only).
corpus.license: Public official documents used for retrieval and citation; reuse terms per source (see source_register.csv). Not re-licensed by Mambo.
corpus.temporal_coverage: Official publications as available on source sites, fetched June 2026; individual document dates vary (see documents.published_date).
corpus.data_type: text (PDF + HTML, OCR fallback for scanned PDFs)
corpus.data_sensitivity: public (official documents); user queries are logged separately under a minimisation policy (see data_quality_report.md).
corpus.quality_summary: 890 documents / 2901 chunks; 99.97% embedded (1 pending); 100% allow-list discipline; 0 duplicate source URLs; 0 orphan chunks; all titles and raw_paths present. See data_quality_report.md.
corpus.bias_and_coverage_notes: Coverage is uneven: education (3 chunks) and zimlii (1) are under-represented; zimra is heaviest (857). OCR used on 8 documents only. Local-language source documents are scarce.

sources.title: Ministry of ICT, Postal & Courier Services
Ministry of Health and Child Care
Ministry of Home Affairs and Cultural Heritage
Ministry of Finance, Economic Development & Investment Promotion
Ministry of Primary and Secondary Education
sources.note: thin coverage — site yielded little extractable text; re-crawl needed

sources.note: independent public legislation publisher; verify reuse terms

sources.note: very thin coverage — judgment ingest is a separate pipeline; needs expansion
